reviews.name: 설이
reviews.content:
봄 시즌을 겨냥한 벚꽃 젤리곰 에디션!!! 처음 봤을 때부터
“너어어어어ㅓ어무 귀엽다” 소리가 바로 나왔던 장난감이에요.
핑크 젤리곰에 벚꽃, 당고 포인트까지 있어서
봄 시즌 느낌 제대로 살려줘요.

사이즈가 크지 않아서 소형견이 물기 편하고,
말랑한 바디라 입에 부담 없이 잘 가지고 놀아요.
특히 벚꽃이랑 당고 부분을 유독 좋아해서
그쪽을 집중해서 물고 노는 모습이 자주 보였어요!!

디자인만 예쁜 제품인 줄 알았지만 
실제로도 가지고 놀 때 반응이 좋아서 생각보다 만족도가 높았고,
봄 시즌 포인트 장난감으로 추천하고 싶어요 🌸🐻!!
reviews.content_en:
A cherry blossom jelly bear edition aimed at spring season!!! This is a toy that made me go "sooooo cuuuute" the moment I first saw it. With the pink jelly bear, cherry blossoms, and dango accents, it really captures that spring vibe perfectly.

The size isn't too big, so it's easy for small dogs to bite, and the soft body is comfortable in their mouth to play with. My pup especially loves the cherry blossom and dango parts, so I often see them focusing on biting and playing with those areas!!

I thought it was just a pretty design, but the actual play response has been really good, so I'm more satisfied than expected. I'd recommend it as a spring season accent toy 🌸🐻!!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
바잇미 시그니처 젤리곰 시리즈가 벚꽃버전으로 출시되었네요..!! 
저는.. 아이들 선물용 말고 제 사리사욕 채우는 용으로도 스페셜에디션이 나오면 늘 사두는 편이었는데요… 이번 벚꽃 젤리곰 진자 귀여워요ㅠㅠ 그리고 당고를 들고있어서 그 사이에 간식 껴주먄 더 잘 놉니다!! 강아지 삑삑이 정난감 선물용으로도.. 견주 수집용으로도 너무 좋아요❤️❤️
reviews.content_en: The BITE ME signature jelly bear series has been released in a cherry blossom version..!! Honestly, I'm the type who buys special editions not just as gifts for the kids, but also to satisfy my own collector's urges... and this cherry blossom jelly bear is seriously cute ㅠㅠ Plus, it's holding a dango, so if you tuck a treat in between, they play with it even more!! Perfect both as a gift toy with the squeaky sound for your pup and as a collector's item for the pet parent ❤️❤️

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
구경하다가 너무 귀여워요 빠른 주문했어요
너무 마음에들어요
작은 저희 아가한테 사이즈 딱이에요
너무 잘 갖고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: I was just browsing and thought it was so cute, so I ordered right away. I love it so much. The size is perfect for our little one. She plays with it so well!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여운데, 꽃이 없는 쪽에 본드 자국이 있어서 아쉬워요 ㅠ!
reviews.content_en: It's really cute, but it's a shame there's a glue mark on the side without the flower ㅠ!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 젤리곰 색깔별로 다 모으고 있는데 신상나와서 구매했어요. 벚꽃에디션 너무 귀엽네요🌸
reviews.content_en: I'm collecting all the different colors of jelly bears, and when the new one came out, I had to get it. The cherry blossom edition is so cute 🌸

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content_en: I can't resist whenever BITE ME releases a new toy

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
보자마자  귀여워서 아이 취향 상관없이 
주문부터 했어요~
받아보니 사진과 똑같고 웃음이 나오네요ㅎㅎ

추운겨울 매일 산책이 어려우니 실내에서  
놀아주려는데..던지고 물고오고 해야하니
마응이 아프네요ㅅㅅ
reviews.content_en:
It was so cute the moment I saw it that I ordered without even thinking about my kid's preferences~ When it arrived, it looks exactly like the photo and it's hilarious ㅎㅎ

Since it's hard to go on walks every day in the cold winter, I'm trying to play with her indoors.. but with all the throwing and retrieving, my arm is hurting ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content_en: Thank you for the great item ㅎㅎ
